tree.setup: The afternoon light falls across the marble counter of a neighborhood bank branch. Behind the glass sits Mr. Qian, a teller who treats every deposit like a small ceremony. He has arranged his stamp pad, his receipt book, and a tiny potted succulent with the care of someone setting a table for honored guests.
tree.setup_zh: 午后的阳光照在社区银行的大理石柜台上。玻璃后面坐着钱先生，一位把每笔存款都当作小仪式的柜员。他把印泥、收据本和一盆小多肉植物摆得整整齐齐，像是在为贵客摆设餐桌。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 欢迎光临！您今天想办什么业务？请慢慢说，我这里不赶时间。
turns.text_pinyin: huānyíng guānglín! nín jīntiān xiǎng bàn shénme yèwù? qǐng mànmàn shuō, wǒ zhèlǐ bù gǎn shíjiān.
turns.text_en: Welcome! What business would you like to handle today? Take your time — I'm in no rush here.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Tell him you'd like to open a savings account.

options.text_zh: 你好，我想开一个储蓄账户。
options.text_pinyin: nǐ hǎo, wǒ xiǎng kāi yí gè chǔxù zhànghù.
options.text_en: Hello, I'd like to open a savings account.
options.feedback: Clear and direct. Mr. Qian nods approvingly — he appreciates someone who knows what they want.

options.text_en: I'd like to save some money.
options.feedback: He understands your meaning, though he'll need to ask a follow-up about which type of account. Still, a fine start.

options.text_zh: 我不太清楚，你们有什么账户？
options.text_pinyin: wǒ bú tài qīngchǔ, nǐmen yǒu shénme zhànghù?
options.text_en: I'm not really sure — what kinds of accounts do you have?
options.feedback: Honest, but Mr. Qian's eyes light up a little too eagerly — you've just invited a twenty-minute lecture on interest rates.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 储蓄账户！非常好的选择。您知道吗，储蓄就像种树——今天种下一棵小树，明天就能乘凉。请把您的身份证给我。
turns.text_pinyin: chǔxù zhànghù! fēicháng hǎo de xuǎnzé. nín zhīdào ma, chǔxù jiù xiàng zhòng shù — jīntiān zhǒng xià yì kē xiǎo shù, míngtiān jiù néng chéng liáng. qǐng bǎ nín de shēnfènzhèng gěi wǒ.
turns.text_en: A savings account! An excellent choice. You know, saving money is like planting a tree — plant a small one today, and tomorrow you'll have shade. Please give me your ID card.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Hand over your ID and ask about interest rates.

options.text_zh: 给你，这是我的身份证。请问现在的利率是多少？
options.text_pinyin: gěi nǐ, zhè shì wǒ de shēnfènzhèng. qǐngwèn xiànzài de lìlǜ shì duōshǎo?
options.text_en: Here you go, this is my ID. What's the current interest rate?
options.feedback: Well done — asking about interest rates shows financial literacy. Mr. Qian practically beams.
Efficient. Mr. Qian accepts it, though he seems a touch disappointed you didn't ask about rates — his favorite topic.

options.text_zh: 等一下，我找一下身份证……在这儿呢。
options.text_pinyin: děng yíxià, wǒ zhǎo yíxià shēnfènzhèng……zài zhèr ne.
options.text_en: Wait a moment, let me find my ID... here it is.
options.feedback: A bit flustered, but Mr. Qian waits with the patience of a man who has seen a thousand people dig through their bags.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 目前一年期的利率是百分之二点一。不算高，但是稳定。您想存多少？
turns.text_pinyin: mùqián yì nián qī de lìlǜ shì bǎi fēn zhī èr diǎn yī. bú suàn gāo, dànshì wěndìng. nín xiǎng cún duōshǎo?
turns.text_en: The current one-year rate is 2.1%. Not high, but stable. How much would you like to deposit?

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Tell him how much you want to deposit.

options.text_zh: 我先存五千块吧。以后每个月再存一点。
options.text_pinyin: wǒ xiān cún wǔqiān kuài ba. yǐhòu měi gè yuè zài cún yìdiǎn.
options.text_en: I'll deposit five thousand yuan first. Then I'll add a bit each month.
options.feedback: Mr. Qian nods with deep respect. 「有计划的人，」 he murmurs, 「才是真正富有的人。」
Every journey starts with a single step — or in this case, a single thousand yuan. Mr. Qian approves.

options.text_zh: 我还没想好，先开户可以吗？
options.text_pinyin: wǒ hái méi xiǎng hǎo, xiān kāi hù kěyǐ ma?
options.text_en: I haven't decided yet — can I just open the account first?
options.feedback: Mr. Qian's succulent seems to droop slightly. But he nods — an empty account is still an account.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 好的，我帮您办理。您要不要设一个密码？六位数字的。
turns.text_pinyin: hǎo de, wǒ bāng nín bànlǐ. nín yào búyào shè yí gè mìmǎ? liù wèi shùzì de.
turns.text_en: OK, I'll process that for you. Would you like to set a password? Six digits.

options.text_zh: 好的，我设一个密码。请问在哪里输入？
options.text_pinyin: hǎo de, wǒ shè yí gè mìmǎ. qǐngwèn zài nǎlǐ shūrù?
options.text_en: OK, I'll set a password. Where do I enter it?
options.feedback: Practical and security-conscious. Mr. Qian slides the keypad toward you with the solemnity of a chess grandmaster offering the first move.

options.text_en: Yes, I want to set a password.
options.feedback: Short and sure. He nods and pushes the keypad your way.
Mr. Qian's left eye twitches almost imperceptibly. He recommends a password the way a doctor recommends breathing.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 都办好了。这是您的存折和银行卡。请您收好。有什么问题随时来找我。
turns.text_pinyin: dōu bàn hǎo le. zhè shì nín de cúnzhé hé yínháng kǎ. qǐng nín shōu hǎo. yǒu shénme wèntí suíshí lái zhǎo wǒ.
turns.text_en: All done. Here are your passbook and bank card. Please keep them safe. Come find me anytime if you have questions.

options.text_zh: 谢谢你，钱先生！你解释得很清楚。再见！
options.text_pinyin: xièxie nǐ, Qián xiānshēng! nǐ jiěshì de hěn qīngchǔ. zàijiàn!
options.text_en: Thank you, Mr. Qian! Your explanation was very clear. Goodbye!
options.feedback: Using his name and complimenting his clarity — Mr. Qian will remember you fondly. His succulent seems to perk up.
Brief but polite. Mr. Qian waves gently, already straightening his stamp pad for the next customer.
A bit abrupt. Mr. Qian watches you leave with the faint sadness of a man whose philosophical moment was cut short.

tree.cultural_note: Chinese banks require a 身份证 (shēnfènzhèng, national ID card) or passport for nearly all transactions. The 存折 (cúnzhé, passbook) is still commonly used alongside bank cards — many people, especially older generations, prefer the tangible record of a passbook.
